sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101722" key="sfondulo/mantis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σφονδῠλό-μαντις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n101722.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prophesying from the spindle</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:188" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.188</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
